stemHtml: Independent parallel approaches are in force and two aircraft are both on parallel approaches. What would the controller be required to do if one aircraft were to drift into the NTZ?

options.a: Order the transgressing aircraft to climb immediately.
options.b: Advise the transgressing aircraft to break-off the approach and go-around.
options.c: Issue appropriate control instructions to manoeuvre the threatened aircraft on the adjacent approach.
options.d: Give instructions to the transgressing aircraft to turn away from the other traffic.
